evidence.snippet: LYNRED, a global leader in developing and manufacturing solution for Unmanned vehicle systems

**Drones play a vital role in critical missions, supporting surveillance, reconnaissance, targeting, and logistics. Thermal imaging isn’t just an enhancement, it’s essential for success in challenging environments.**

LYNRED infrared solutions bring your thermal systems to life with the introduction of two new solutions:
 • Cooled detectors on the PlugUp platform
 • Advanced Thermal Imager (ATI) modules

items.notes: Thermal infrared (IR) detectors and thermal imager modules (ATI, ATTO, GALATEA, SEEGNUS product lines) used in drone and defense ISR applications for surveillance, reconnaissance, and targeting.

evidence.snippet:
#### Grenoble
364 Avenue de Valence,
Actipole CS 10021
38113 Veurey-Voroize, France

##### HEADQUARTERS, DEVELOPMENT & PRODUCTION
364 Avenue de Valence,
Actipole CS 10021
38113 Veurey-Voroize France

**The Advanced Thermal Imager ATI320** provides **a versatile and efficient solution** for various thermal imaging applications. Specifically engineered **for high-volume integration and automated handling**, the ATI320 offers camera makers unparalleled performance in an incredibly lightweight package.
ATI320 has been designed as a component enabling high volume integration thanks to its BGA (Ball Grid Array) package.

LYNRED infrared solutions bring your thermal systems to life with the introduction of two new solutions:
 • Cooled detectors on the PlugUp platform
 • Advanced Thermal Imager (ATI) modules

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Lynred sells IR detector components and thermal imager modules to camera makers/OEMs for integration into drone and defense thermal imaging systems. ATI320 is explicitly 'engineered for high-volume integration' and 'offers camera makers unparalleled performance'.

tagline: French thermal infrared detector and sensor manufacturer producing uncooled microbolometer and cooled MCT/MWIR cores and integrated modules (ATI, ATTO, YOCTO, GALATEA, ARGO families) for defense, drone, and space ISR payloads. In production across multiple resolution formats (320×240 to 1280×1024). NDAA compliance status unknown; no Blue UAS certification found in public record.
